CP00-670 is a clean descriptor-only Risk-B service-implementation-slice pack. Static read-only inspection confirms:
- Honest posture — `production_ready=false`/`runtime_ready=false` across all evidence; no runtime/production/enterprise-trust overclaim, gates unweakened.
- Boundaries enforced in `validators.js`/`service.js` and asserted by `model.test.js`; contract projection matches both committed contract files.
- Coverage matches baseline (40 units, correct deliverable/micro distribution).
- Hermes confined to review packet/receipt (`hermes_runtime_opened=false`); Claude read-only, not final approver.
- No secrets/tokens/real data in changed files; changed-file-scope cleanly isolates unrelated dirty files; auth preflight passed (CP178+ hardening satisfied).

The single P3 is a provenance disclosure: the verdict rests on read-only inspection, so the validation-matrix exit codes are pack-asserted (harness-executed), not reviewer-re-run.
